metrolink: Due to a tram fault we currently have a Minor Deley on the Altrincham and Bury Lines.
headlines: Windows devs rerolled old code to save precious bytes

crew_quote: "Well, at least it's not raining here in Altrincham, so I've decided to whip up a curry — if it starts pouring, I might have to rethink my plans for the night!"
